sequences.name: Post-Sale Customer Onboarding
sequences.description: 7-touch sequence that confirms the sale, sets expectations, and drives referrals

steps.body: Hi {{customer_first_name}}, you're confirmed! {{rep_first_name}} will be in touch within 24hrs to schedule installation. Questions? Reply here anytime.

steps.subject: Welcome to {{company_name}} — here's what happens next
steps.body:
Hi {{customer_first_name}},

Thank you for choosing {{company_name}}. Here's what you can expect:

1. **Scheduling call** — {{rep_first_name}} will call within 24 hours to lock in your installation date.
2. **Pre-install inspection** — Our team will confirm site details 2 days before install.
3. **Installation day** — Typically {{install_hours}} hours. We leave the site clean.
4. **Activation** — You'll receive a welcome kit with everything you need.

Your order summary:
- Product: {{product_name}}
- Amount: {{sale_amount}}
- Rep: {{rep_first_name}} {{rep_last_name}}

Questions? Reply to this email or call {{support_phone}}.

— The {{company_name}} Team
Hi {{customer_first_name}}, this is {{rep_first_name}} from {{company_name}}. Reaching out to schedule your install — when works best this week? Morning or afternoon?

steps.subject: Getting ready for your {{product_name}} installation
steps.body:
Hi {{customer_first_name}},

Your installation is coming up! A few quick things to do beforehand:

✅ Clear the work area ({{prep_instructions}})
✅ Have someone 18+ home during the install window
✅ Note your WiFi password if applicable

Need to reschedule? Just reply or call {{rep_phone}}.

See you soon!
Hey {{customer_first_name}}! Quick check-in — how's everything going with your {{product_name}}? Any questions or issues, just text back. We're here.

steps.subject: How are we doing, {{customer_first_name}}?
{{customer_first_name}}, time for your complimentary 90-day check-in

sequences.name: Callback Reminder Sequence
sequences.description: Multi-touch to remind rep + warm the customer before the callback visit

steps.body: 📍 Callback in 30 min — {{customer_name}} at {{address}}. They said: "{{callback_reason}}". Decision maker: {{decision_maker}}.
Hi {{customer_first_name}}, this is {{rep_first_name}} from {{company_name}}. Just a heads-up — I'll be stopping by tomorrow as planned. Looking forward to seeing you!

⏰ Time for your callback — {{customer_name}} at {{address}}. Last objection: {{last_objection}}. Suggested opener: "Last time you mentioned {{callback_reason}} — I wanted to come back with an answer."
Did you hit {{address}}? Mark it done or reschedule so we keep the lead warm.

sequences.name: Interested Lead Nurture
sequences.description: Keep a warm lead engaged until they're ready to buy

steps.body: Hi {{customer_first_name}}, great chatting with you today! I'm sending over a quick overview of {{product_name}} so you have everything in one place. Any questions, just reply!

steps.subject: Everything you need to know about {{product_name}}

steps.body: Hey {{customer_first_name}}, {{rep_first_name}} here — just wanted to see if you had any questions after looking things over. We have a couple open slots this week if you'd like to move forward.

steps.subject: Still thinking it over, {{customer_first_name}}?

sequences.name: No Answer Re-Touch
sequences.description: Auto-schedule a re-knock for no-answer doors at peak answer times

steps.body: No answer at {{address}}. Best retouch time based on street data: {{best_retouch_time}}. Added to your route.

sequences.name: Rep Daily Brief
sequences.description: Push at shift start with today's best doors, callbacks due, and weather

steps.body: ☀️ Good morning {{rep_first_name}}! Today: {{callbacks_due}} callbacks due, {{hot_doors}} hot doors on your route. Best hours today: {{best_hours}}. Weather: {{weather_summary}}. Go get em!
